Sounds clean and mostly it is but not every day Last week we updated credit pricing backend changes Claude handled
all of it Clean code test passing looked perfect. but they forgot to update one part of the front end
So customers were seeing old prices on one screen and new prices after checkout Nobody caught it until a customer
